case_title: ALYSSA BROMBERG ET AL VS. ROGENA CENIZA

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROMBERG, ALYSSA SCHRAMM, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENIZA, ROGENA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUN-29-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CENIZA, ROGENA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BROMBERG, ALYSSA SCHRAMM, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT CENIZA, ROGENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2018 BY LESLIE C. NICHOLS. 506 PLAINTIFF'S ALYSSA BROMBERG AND MARK SCHRAMM ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROGENA CENIZA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES CONTINUANCE TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE AND ELECTS TO PROCEED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MARK SCHRAMM ON 7-9-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNDELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
